  <style>
    body,
    table,
    input,
    textarea,
    select,
    option {
      font-family: 'ヒラギノ角ゴシック', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif, 'ヒラギノ明朝 ProN', 'Hiragino Mincho ProN', 'Noto Serif JP';
    }

    #t-header {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
      z-index: 100;
    }

    #t-header::before {
      content: "";
      width: 100%;
      height: 80px;
      background-color: #fff;
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%);
      z-index: -1;
    }

    #t-header .t-header_nav nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 30px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%);
    }

    #t-header .t-header_nav .t-header_cart {
      position: fixed;
      top: 25px;
      right: 90px;
    }

    @media screen and (max-width:1050px) {
      #t-header .t-header_nav nav ul li:nth-child(1) {
        display: none;
      }
    }
  </style>

<script>
  $(function() {
    var pagetop = $("#page-top");
    pagetop.hide();
    $(window).scroll(function() {
      if ($(this).scrollTop() > 100) {
        pagetop.fadeIn();
      } else {
        pagetop.fadeOut();
      }
    });
    pagetop.click(function() {
      $("body, html").animate({
        scrollTop: 0
      }, 500);
      return false;
    });
  });
</script>
